questions.statement: Diffusion of light in the atmosphere takes place due to
options: Carbon dioxide /
Dust Particles /
Helium /
More than one of the above /

questions.statement: Which of the following can produce a real image?&nbsp;
options: Plane mirror /
Concave mirror /
Concave lens /
More than one of the above /

questions.statement: Total internal reflection will never take place if the light goes from water to glass. Which among the following will explain the reason for this phenomenon?
options: For total internal reflection, the light should travel from rarer to denser medium.&nbsp; /
For total internal reflection, the light should travel from denser to rarer medium.&nbsp; /
For total internal reflection,the&nbsp; light should travel from rare to rarer medium.&nbsp; /
More than one of the above /

questions.statement: Which of the following is incorrect about human eye ?
options: The iris controls the amount of light entering into eye /
Cone cells are sensitive to bright light /
Rod cells sense colour /
More than one of the above /

questions.statement: When the Sun is near the horizon during the morning or evening, it appears reddish. The phenomenon that is responsible for this observation is
options: Reflection of light /
<span style="color: rgb(33, 37, 41);">Scattering of light</span> /
Dispersion of light /
More than one of the above /
